---
name: AI Incident / Bug Report
about: Report a destructive or unexpected behavior by an AI Agent while using this workflow.
title: '[INCIDENT] '
labels: bug, incident
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the Incident (發生了什麼事？)**
What destructive or unexpected action did the AI take? (e.g., deleted wrong files, caused an infinite loop, hallucinated a non-existent API).

**Which Phase were you in? (當時處於哪個階段？)**
e.g., Phase 6 (Agile Implementation)

**What was the AI Agent / Model? (使用的 AI 模型與工具？)**
e.g., Cursor, Windsurf, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, ChatGPT 4o

**How can we reproduce it? (如何重現？)**
What prompt or action triggered this behavior?

**Proposed Safeguard (建議的防護機制？)**
Do you have a suggestion on how we can update the SOP or Safety Rules to prevent this in the future?
